description: Ground truth for the split-pr synthetic evaluation dataset. Each topic represents a logically cohesive change that should be grouped together in a single sub-PR.

topics.name: New user preferences endpoint
topics.description: Add a UserPreferences model, a CRUD API at /preferences, and corresponding tests. Uses the cache layer for read-through caching.

topics.name: Rename build_log_prefix to log_context
topics.description: Consistent rename of a utility function across all call sites. This is one logical change even though it touches many files.
topics.notes: This is a cross-cutting refactor — all changes are mechanically related. Must NOT be split.

topics.name: TTL cache infrastructure
topics.description: Add a thread-safe in-memory cache with TTL support, then wire it into the database layer via cached repository wrappers.
topics.notes: Foundational infrastructure. Preferences and bug fix topics depend on this.

topics.name: Fix off-by-one in low stock query threshold
topics.description: The get_low_stock_items query used < instead of <= for the threshold comparison, causing items exactly at the threshold to be missed.
topics.notes: Single-line fix in a file shared with two other topics. Must be split at hunk level.

topics.name: WarehouseRepository with zone utilization queries
topics.description: Add a new repository class for warehouse operations including zone utilization stats and availability search.
topics.notes: Uses the renamed log_context function. Shares database/queries.py with the bug fix topic.

topics.name: Vendor rate limiting library
topics.description: Copy the ratelimit library (v2.1.0) into _vendor/ for use as API middleware.
topics.notes: All files under _vendor/. Easy to group by path prefix.

topics.name: New reporting package with generators
topics.description: Add a reporting module with empty __init__.py files and a basic ReportGenerator class.
topics.notes: Tests empty __init__.py handling. Two of the three files are empty.

topics.name: Test fixtures, helpers, and integration tests
topics.description: Add shared test infrastructure: conftest.py with fixtures, test helper factories, and cross-module integration tests.
topics.notes: Spread across 3 commits. Pure test infrastructure, not tied to a specific feature.

topics.name: Project config and dependency updates
topics.description: Bump version to 1.3.0, add redis and pytest-cov dependencies, add coverage config, add .gitignore.
topics.notes: Config/dependency changes that don't affect runtime behavior.
